description: Enhanced UI components, global styles, animations, and dark mode support. Add CSS transitions for page elements, improve the global styles with better focus states, add a Toast/notification component for user feedback on actions (delete, save, etc.), add a Skeleton loading component, and improve form validation feedback across auth pages.
steps: 1. Create src/components/ui/Toast.tsx: A toast notification component that supports success/error/info/warning variants. Uses a context provider pattern so any page can show toasts. Auto-dismisses after 4 seconds. Stacks multiple toasts.
2. Create src/components/ui/ToastProvider.tsx: Context provider wrapping the app that provides showToast() function. Add it to src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx wrapping children.
3. Create src/components/ui/Skeleton.tsx: A reusable skeleton loading component with different shapes (rectangle, circle, text lines) to replace individual animate-pulse divs across pages.

4. Enhance src/app/globals.css: Add CSS keyframe animations (fadeIn, slideUp, slideInRight for sidebar), add transition utilities, add smooth scroll behavior, improve focus-visible styles. Add a .animate-fadeIn, .animate-slideUp class.
5. Improve src/components/ui/Modal.tsx: Add enter/exit animations (scale + fade), add keyboard support (Escape to close), improve focus trapping.

6. Improve form validation on src/app/[locale]/(auth)/register/page.tsx: Add inline field validation (show error under specific field), add password strength indicator, real-time validation as user types.
7. Improve src/app/[locale]/(auth)/login/page.tsx: Add show/hide password toggle, better error messages with specific hints.
acceptance_criteria: Toast component renders success/error notifications and auto-dismisses
ToastProvider is integrated into the app layout
Skeleton component is reusable with different shape options
Modal has Escape key support and enter animation
Register page shows inline validation errors per field
Login page has show/hide password toggle
New CSS animations are defined in globals.css
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit in /projects/sandbox/YUMYLAND to verify TypeScript compiles
Review that new components follow existing patterns (use client, cn utility, Tailwind classes)
findings: All TypeScript errors are pre-existing due to missing node_modules (Cannot find module react/next/etc, JSX.IntrinsicElements). The TS2741 'children missing' errors on layout.tsx and TS2322 'key' error on Toast.tsx are false positives caused by missing React type definitions - JSX children and key prop are properly passed via JSX content. Code follows existing patterns exactly. Use NODE_OPTIONS='' prefix when running npx commands.
